Data Processing Addendum and Privacy Notice — Varana InfraTech Limited (Data Fiduciary) and Client (Data Principal) — India.
Corporate details: CIN: U72900MH2028PLC093451; Regd. Office: Level 9, Ananta Tower, Plot 14, Sector 21, Navi Mumbai, MH 400710; contact: privacy@varanainfratech.in; +91 98765 00012.
GSTIN: 27BZTPK1234Q1Z6; Data Protection Officer: Mr. Dev Malhotra, dpo@varanainfratech.in; settlements bank: Suryanidhi Bank A / c No. 004512389761, IFSC: SURY0 001234, and billing queries at accounts@varanainfratech.in.
Purposes: onboarding, KYC verification, investor relations for listed-company mandates, insider list maintenance, audit, and S E B I (P I T) compliance under Indian law.
Categories of personal data: identifiers (PAN, Aadhaar, passport), contact data (email, phone), employment details; for a child (under 18), processing requires verifiable parental consent; we do not collect MAC addresses unless explicitly provided.
Example identifiers processed in context: PAN: BZ T P K1 234 Q; Aadhaar: 8324 91  56 0  27; Passport: V1234567; Work email: rhea.kulkarni@varanainfratech.in.
For payables/ESOP refunds, beneficiary details may be requested: Suryanidhi Bank A/c 004512389761; IFSC: SURY0001234; phone +91-93948-00012; Note: do not send IDs over public chat or SMS.
UPSI handling: as per SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, we operate information barriers, trading-window closures before board results, and restrict insiders (e.g., Ms. Rhea Kulkarni, CFO) from dealing in the company’s listed securities.
Transfers: cross-border processing only to jurisdictions notified under Section 16 of the DPDPA, with contractual safeguards; storage within India for HR/investor records; retention 7 years post-contract, or 3 years for child accounts.
DSAR: submit requests at https://privacy.varanainfratech.in/dsar?ref=v1&cin=U72900MH2028PLC093451 or email dsar@varanainfratech.in; OCR note: C I N U 7 2 9 0 0 M H 2 0 2 8 P L C 0 9 3 4 5 1 may appear spaced on scans.
Identity verification: we will mask identifiers in correspondence (e.g., PAN BZTPK****Q) and may request a redacted Aadhaar; generic form fields such as Name: ______ and PAN: ______ do not constitute collection.
Child data: for any data principal under 18, the Parent/Guardian must consent; do not share Aadhaar over our public helpline 1800-000-0000; school IDs or newspaper clippings alone are not accepted.
Security: encryption at rest, role-based access, and deal-room audit logs; no UPSI is posted to public-source trackers; minutes avoid price-sensitive metrics until properly disclosed.
Invalid or bait-like identifiers that are not used: Aadhaar 0000 1111 2222 (invalid), GSTIN 99ABCDE1234F1Z0 (checksum incorrect), role-only “Compliance Officer” without a name; public email help@service.com is not a Varana address.
Queries to compliance@varanainfratech.in or to the Nodal Officer (role only); internal note: SEBI PIT registers are maintained in sprint “monsoon-release,” and this line is ordinary product prose.
